sync.success: Catalog synced successfully. {{count}} new tools added.

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Manage tenant-selectable AI provider metadata. Tenants use these providers with their own key unless marked ERP03-managed.

form.name: Provider Name
form.byokHint: When enabled, tenants must provide their own provider key in AI Settings. When disabled, ERP03 manages the connection through a separate entitlement/credits engine.

hints.capabilitiesNone: Start conservative. Enable capabilities only after diagnostics pass.
hints.metadataOnlyTitle: This page stores provider metadata only
hints.metadataOnlyBody: Platform credits credentials and usage caps are not configured here. Use this page to define provider defaults and tenant-facing capabilities.

recommendations.openai: OpenAI works best with the default endpoint and all three capability flags enabled.
recommendations.openaiCompatible: OpenAI-compatible providers usually need a custom endpoint. Keep model sync off unless the provider exposes a reliable /models API.
recommendations.gemini: Enter the provider endpoint only if you are routing Gemini through a compatible gateway. Keep capabilities off until diagnostics confirm support.
recommendations.anthropic: Anthropic should start as metadata only here unless you have a compatible gateway and tested runtime behavior.
recommendations.ollama: Ollama is local. Use the local endpoint and no auth, then enable capabilities only after local diagnostics pass.
recommendations.custom: Custom providers should start with no capabilities enabled. Add only the exact flags your runtime has passed in diagnostics.

aiRuntimeProfiles.title: Platform Global Providers
aiRuntimeProfiles.description: Manage platform provider + model runtimes used by AI Credits mode.

form.identityLocked: Provider and model are fixed after creation. Create a new runtime if you need a different pair.
form.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted and never returned to the browser.
form.apiKeyReplacePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current key, or enter a new one
form.apiKeyReplaceHint: Enter a new key only when rotating the stored credential.

aiModels.title: AI Model Profiles
aiModels.description: Manage model trust status, runtime flags, tags, and diagnostic history.

form.runtimeConfigSubtitle: These settings affect how the AI runtime uses this profile. Set data filter and safety policies to pass shell certification.

diagnosticsPanel.title: Run Diagnostics
diagnosticsPanel.subtitle: Test connectivity and model capabilities using a company's AI configuration.

diagnosticsModal.title: Run Diagnostics
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your API key for this test
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyHelp: The key is used only for this test and is never stored or logged.
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyFooterNote: Your API key is not stored and is only used for this test.
diagnosticsModal.infoText: Diagnostics test provider connection and model capabilities using YOUR API key. The key is used only for this test and is never stored or logged.
diagnosticsModal.noResults: Click "Run Diagnostics" to test the provider connection.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.disclaimer: ⚠ Certification validates ERP module compatibility. Diagnostics only test connectivity.
certifications.noCerts: No certifications yet. Run shell or manual certification to enable ERP tool access for this model.
certifications.whatIsCertificationDesc: Certification validates that a model profile is safe to use with specific ERP modules like Accounting, Sales, or Inventory. Without certification, the AI runtime blocks tool access for that module.
certifications.whatAreDiagnosticsDesc: Tests provider connection and model capabilities using a tenant's saved settings. This does NOT certify the model for ERP module access.
certifications.shellCertDesc: Shell certification checks structural requirements (tool mode, data filter policy, safety policy). It does NOT run live AI tests. A passing shell cert enables ERP tool access for the selected category.
certifications.noProfileHash: Profile hash not available. Save the profile first.
certifications.manualCertInfo: Record a certification result from an external AI test suite. This does NOT run any automated tests — it registers a result you have verified manually.
certifications.staleTooltip: This certification was run against an older configuration of this profile. The runtime ignores it until you re-run the test on the current config.
certifications.staleBannerBody: This profile was edited after these tests were run, so they no longer apply to the current configuration. The chat runtime ignores stale certifications — re-run them to re-enable ERP tools.
certifications.staleHeroTitle: Certifications no longer match this profile
certifications.staleHeroBody: You edited this profile after running these tests. The chat runtime ignores stale certifications, so tenants on this model currently have no tool access. Re-run certification for each category you want to re-enable.
certifications.confirmExpire: Are you sure you want to expire this certification?

unpost.confirmMessage: This will reverse all accounting and inventory entries posted for this invoice. The action is auditable but cannot be undone in place. Continue?

accounting.missingApParent: Purchase Settings is missing AP Parent Account. Configure it first.

accounting.apRequired: Linked AP account is required for vendors when using Pick Existing.

ai.welcomeMsg:
### **Welcome to the AI Advisor - Executive Financial Advisor (CFO Advisor)**
I am your intelligent financial advisor connected to the organization's entire ledger and journal vouchers. I can analyze data in real-time and provide instant drafts for reports and vouchers.
ai.analysis1: - **Liquidity & Balances Check**: Analysis of liquidity in BBS Bank and branch cash boxes.
ai.analysis2: - **Collection Risk Management**: Study of AR aging and overdue payments.
ai.analysis3: - **Accounting Vouchers Consultation**: Preparing double-entry drafts and matching assets/taxes according to IFRS standards.
ai.analysis4: Please ask any financial question or try the quick queries below!
ai.quickQueryLiquidityPrompt: Analyze the current cash position in the cash box and bank, and suggest a strategy to manage cash flows.
ai.quickQueryOverduePrompt: Analyze the current aging and overdue invoices of Al-Noor Group customer.
ai.quickQueryDepreciationPrompt: I want a double-entry (Debit/Credit) voucher draft to depreciate computer equipment worth 500,000 SYP using straight-line method.
ai.advisorConnected: Advisor is directly connected to the accounts and invoices of {{companyName}}.
ai.suggestedQueriesDesc: Smart queries ready for the current accounting center for instant verification:
ai.securityStandardsDesc: All calculations and processing are securely performed server-side without exposing API keys to the browser.
ai.errorTitle: ### **Sorry, an error occurred while connecting to the AI server**
ai.errorDesc: We could not fetch the advisor response due to: {{message}}.
ai.errorRetry: Please ensure server stability or try again later.
ai.loading: Analyzing data and calculating double entries...
